description: This file defines API routes for a manufacturing defect management system using FastAPI. It includes endpoints for retrieving, creating, updating, and listing defects, actions, and related data; also includes dashboard summaries and export functionality.

methods.name: PagedResponse _paged( meta_total: int, limit: int, offset: int, items: List[Dict[str, Any]] )
methods.description: Utility function to create paged responses with metadata.

methods.name: UserMeOut auth_me(user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated))
methods.description: Returns the current authenticated user profile info.

methods.name: List[Dict[str,Any]] list_users( is_active: Optional[bool] = Query( True, description="If true, returns only active users" ), limit: int = Query(200, ge=1, le=500), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Lists active users for assignment, requiring specific roles.

methods.name: list_defect_types( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches list of defect types from config.

methods.name: list_lines( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches list of production lines.

methods.name: list_shifts( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches list of shift configurations.

methods.name: list_parts( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches list of parts.

methods.name: list_severity_rules( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})), )
methods.description: Fetches severity rules, restricted to quality engineer role.

methods.name: create_defect( payload: DefectCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"operator", "production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Creates a new defect record.

methods.name: list_defects( limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status"), line_id: Optional[UUID] = None, defect_type_id: Optional[UUID] = None, from_date: Optional[date] = Query( None, description="Filter occurred_at >= from_date" ), to_date: Optional[date] = Query(None, description="Filter occurred_at <= to_date"), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Lists defects with optional filters and pagination.

methods.name: get_defect( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches a specific defect by ID.

methods.name: update_defect( defect_id: UUID, payload: DefectUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Updates fields of a defect.

methods.name: defect_status_history( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Retrieves the status change history of a defect.

methods.name: get_rca( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Fetches RCA record for a defect.

methods.name: upsert_rca( defect_id: UUID, payload: RcaUpsert, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})), )
methods.description: Creates or updates RCA for a defect.

methods.name: create_action( payload: ActionCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Creates a corrective action for a defect.

methods.name: list_actions( limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=200), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias="status"), due_before: Optional[date] = None, defect_id: Optional[UUID] = Query( None, description="Optional filter: only actions for this defect" ), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Lists corrective actions with filters.

methods.name: get_action( action_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Retrieves a specific corrective action.

methods.name: list_actions_for_defect( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Lists all actions for a specific defect.

methods.name: update_action( action_id: UUID, payload: ActionUpdate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Updates details of a corrective action, including verification.

methods.name: action_status_history( action_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Retrieves status change history for an action.

methods.name: create_attachment_metadata( payload: AttachmentCreate, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), user: AuthenticatedUser = Depends( require_roles({"operator", "production_supervisor", "quality_engineer"}) ), )
methods.description: Creates metadata record for an attachment related to a defect.

methods.name: list_attachments( defect_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Lists attachments for a defect.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] dashboard_summary( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Provides summary KPIs for dashboards.

methods.name: dashboard_pareto( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Provides Pareto data for defect types.

methods.name: dashboard_trends_daily( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Provides daily defect trend data.

methods.name: dashboard_actions_due( db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Provides due or overdue actions overview.

methods.name: list_audit( limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=500), offset: int = Query(0, ge=0), entity_type: Optional[str] = None, entity_id: Optional[UUID] = None, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_roles({"quality_engineer"})), )
methods.description: Lists audit logs with optional filtering.

methods.name: export_defect_pdf( defect_id: UUID, request: Request, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
methods.description: Exports an audit-ready PDF for a defect, includes defect details, RCA, actions, and attachments.

ctags.signature: ( action_id: UUID, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), _: AuthenticatedUser = Depends(require_authenticated), )
